description: Exploited CVE-2021-44228 in Apache Log4j 2.14.1. Achieved RCE on internet banking app server within 2 hours.
evidence: Attacker-controlled LDAP server served malicious class file. System shell obtained.
remediation: Immediate: Patch Log4j to 2.17+. Deploy WAF virtual patch. Implement JVM security policies.

finding_title: Service Account Used for Domain Admin Escalation
description: Compromised app service account had excessive permissions. Used to escalate to Domain Admin via Kerberoasting.
evidence: Kerberoast ticket cracked in 4 hours using Hashcat. Domain Admin credentials obtained.
remediation: Implement least privilege for service accounts. Enable LAPS. Audit privileged accounts.

finding_title: Customer PII Exfiltrated via DNS Tunneling
description: Exfiltrated 50MB of customer PII data over DNS tunneling channel. Not detected by SIEM for 6 hours.
evidence: DNS queries captured containing base64 encoded customer records.
remediation: Implement DNS filtering (RPZ), DNS exfiltration detection rules in SIEM, DLP solution.

description: PowerShell scripts executing encoded commands on core banking servers. No SIEM alerts triggered.
evidence: Hunting query: process_name:powershell.exe AND command:*encodedCommand* returned 45 events
remediation: Enable PowerShell ScriptBlock logging. Create SIEM alerts for encoded PowerShell commands.
